sections.paragraph:
Original: רעמה

Transliteration: ra‛mâh

Phonetic: rah-maw'

BDB Definition:

Raamah = "horse's mane"
  1. son of Cush and father of Sheba and Dedan (noun proper masculine)
  2. a home of traders (noun proper locative)

Origin: the same as H7483

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech:
